Rejected because the image reads as an unrelated human adult costume board.

notes: Generated in the parent thread using the built-in image generation tool.
Final board follows the existing vertical project character-board layout: three state panels plus lower detail and material panels.

Visual identity now preserves Helian Xuedai as a high-ranking white-bear-clan female guard with a human round face, round bear ears, bear-clan facial markings, strong guard build, and elite tribal equipment.
The final board explicitly avoids the prior bear-face beast-head direction and the prior Frosthoof deer guard direction.

The locked Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem was not redesigned. Northern symbol language appears as bear-claw cuts, bonewood, rawhide cord, oath cord, shield scratches, jade, bronze, and object materials rather than a new crest or public badge.
Rejected v001 deer-clan attempt and v002 bear-face attempt were retained in history before canonical replacement.
No background Codex thread was created because this was a single-asset direct parent generation.
